contract_for_v2_11c.purpose: Download official reference data page as raw HTML and discover official CSV links.
contract_for_v2_11c.allowed_in_v2_11c: HTTP GET raw HTML, preserve exact bytes, compute SHA256, record metadata, discover links.
contract_for_v2_11c.prohibited_in_v2_11c: No normalization, no net-new filtering, no rebuild, no scoring.
contract_for_v2_11c.raw_preservation_policy: Save raw HTML exactly as received under raw/cboe_europe_v2_11c/.

contract_for_v2_11c.url_or_discovery_rule: DISCOVER_FROM_REFERENCE_DATA_PAGE: links mentioning live symbols CSV.
contract_for_v2_11c.purpose: Acquire official Live Symbols CSV files if exposed by Cboe Europe.
contract_for_v2_11c.allowed_in_v2_11c: Download discovered CSV files only, preserve raw bytes, compute SHA256, record metadata.
contract_for_v2_11c.prohibited_in_v2_11c: No schema coercion, no row filtering, no issuer inference, no rebuild.
contract_for_v2_11c.raw_preservation_policy: Save each CSV exactly as received with stable filename and manifest entry.

contract_for_v2_11c.url_or_discovery_rule: DISCOVER_FROM_REFERENCE_DATA_PAGE: links mentioning enhanced live symbols CSV.
contract_for_v2_11c.purpose: Prefer enhanced CSV only if it contains richer symbol/name/MIC/country/currency fields.
contract_for_v2_11c.allowed_in_v2_11c: Download discovered enhanced CSV files, preserve raw bytes, compute SHA256, record metadata.
contract_for_v2_11c.prohibited_in_v2_11c: No preference decision in acquisition phase; preference belongs to validation.
contract_for_v2_11c.raw_preservation_policy: Save raw enhanced CSV separately from non-enhanced CSV.

contract_for_v2_11c.purpose: Fallback acquisition if official CSV links are not sufficient.
contract_for_v2_11c.allowed_in_v2_11c: Download raw HTML only and record metadata.
contract_for_v2_11c.prohibited_in_v2_11c: No brittle scraping, no table extraction, no rebuild.
contract_for_v2_11c.raw_preservation_policy: Save raw HTML exactly as received.

contract_for_v2_11c.url_or_discovery_rule: Derived from official files only; do not assume primary exchange semantics.
contract_for_v2_11c.purpose: Prevent incorrect exchange+ticker assumptions before validation.
contract_for_v2_11c.allowed_in_v2_11c: Record venue/MIC labels exactly as source exposes them.
contract_for_v2_11c.prohibited_in_v2_11c: No mapping to primary listing exchange, no dedup logic, no key acceptance.

planned_downloads_for_v2_11c.notes: Official discovery page. No data normalization.

planned_downloads_for_v2_11c.url_or_rule: Discover official Live Symbols CSV links from reference_data_page.html
Discover official Live Symbols Enhanced CSV links from reference_data_page.html
planned_downloads_for_v2_11c.notes: Validation later decides whether enhanced is preferred.
Fallback raw HTML only. No brittle table scraping in acquisition.

validation_handoff_to_v2_11d: Does Cboe Europe expose stable official Live Symbols CSV files?
Are CSV files available for BXE, CXE, DXE, TRF EU, TRF UK and/or SIS?
Does enhanced CSV contain richer symbol/name/MIC/country/currency fields?
How many rows exist before net-new filtering?
How many MIC+ticker, venue+ticker, ISIN and exchange+ticker candidates are net-new against expanded_universe_v2_8e?
Are rows ordinary shares, ETFs, funds, ETCs or mixed instruments?
Can Cboe Europe rows be normalized conservatively without brittle scraping?
Does Cboe Europe unlock the 15000-row first expansion threshold?
Should Cboe Europe be source provider, candidate provider, enrichment, reference-only or deferred?
mic_venue_caution: BXE, CXE, DXE, TRF and SIS must be treated as venue/source semantics until validation.
Do not assume Cboe venue equals primary listing exchange.
Do not accept exchange+ticker keys without validation against MIC/venue/ISIN evidence.
Preserve source MIC, venue, market and symbol fields exactly in acquisition.
